CustomField.formula: IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(PDE__r.FTA__c, "BT <= 36 kVA - CU"), NOT(ISNULL(Nouvelle_Echeance__c)), PrixBase__c != 0 ), '√', IF( AND( ISPICKVAL(PDE__r.FTA__c, "BT <= 36 kVA - MU"), PrixHP__c != 0, PrixHC__c != 0, NOT(ISNULL(Nouvelle_Echeance__c)) ), '√', IF( AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(PDE__r.FTA__c, "BT <= 36Kva - CU 4 postes"), ISPICKVAL(PDE__r.FTA__c, "BT <= 36Kva - MU 4 postes"), ISPICKVAL(PDE__r.FTA__c, "BT > 36 kVA - LU"), ISPICKVAL(PDE__r.FTA__c, "BT > 36 kVA - CU")), PrixHphMwh__c != 0, PrixHchMwh__c != 0, PrixHpeMwh__c != 0, PrixHceMwh__c != 0, NOT(ISNULL(Nouvelle_Echeance__c)) ), '√', IF( AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(PDE__r.FTA__c, "HTA - PF - CU"), ISPICKVAL(PDE__r.FTA__c, "HTA - PF - LU"), ISPICKVAL(PDE__r.FTA__c, "HTA - PM - CU"), ISPICKVAL(PDE__r.FTA__c, "HTA - PM - LU")), PrixHphMwh__c != 0, PrixHchMwh__c != 0, PrixHpeMwh__c != 0, PrixHceMwh__c != 0, PointesMWh__c != 0, NOT(ISNULL(Nouvelle_Echeance__c)) ), '√', IF( AND(TECH_RT__c = 'PDE_Gaz', AbonnementMois__c != 0, PrixMolecule__c != 0, NOT(ISNULL(Nouvelle_Echeance__c))), '√', 'X' )))))
CustomField.label: QLI Remplie
